name: Fallen Paladin
tips: Fallen Paladin heals 2🤍 in the Rally Phase (start of its owner's turn). With a 42🤍 base, it's one of the tankiest minions in the game and extremely hard to remove through chip damage.
Only obtainable via Reanimated Bones transform (1+4 = 5 mana across turns). This is the same total cost as hard-casting but lets you split the investment.
The Rally Phase heal means Fallen Paladin gets stronger the longer it stays alive. Pair it with a defensive board position to maximize its sustain.
At 16🗡️, it hits hard enough to trade with most midrange minions while healing back the damage taken. It wins nearly every war of attrition.
As an Undead, Fallen Paladin shares a tribe with Grave Caller and Reanimated Bones. A dedicated Undead package gives you access to all three transform options.
rulings: The heal fires in the Rally Phase at the start of the Paladin's owner's turn. It heals 2 🤍 unconditionally — no condition check.
Heals up to the minion's current max 🤍 (base 42 plus any max_health_bonus buffs). Cannot overheal above the cap.
Only one tick per turn cycle — taking 30 damage and then healing means Paladin is still down 28 that round.
